patches.hypothesis: The bug is caused by the absence of a null check in the method.
The `getDomainAxisIndex()` method was not handling null inputs correctly, causing the test to fail.
patches.changes:
- if (axis == null) return -1;
+ if (axis == null) throw new IllegalArgumentException("Null 'axis' argument.");
patches.diff:
- if (axis == null) return -1;
+ if (axis == null) throw new IllegalArgumentException("Null 'axis' argument.");
patches.original_code: /** * Returns the index of the specified axis, or -1 if the axis * is not assigned to the plot. * * @param axis the axis (null not permitted). * * @return The axis index. * * @see #getDomainAxis(int) * @see #getRangeAxisIndex(ValueAxis) * * @since 1.0.3 */ public int getDomainAxisIndex(CategoryAxis axis) { return this.domainAxes.indexOf(axis); }

/** * Returns the index of the specified axis, or -1 if the axis * is not assigned to the plot. * * @param axis the axis (null not permitted). * * @return The axis index. * * @see #getDomainAxis(int) * @see #getRangeAxisIndex(ValueAxis) * * @since 1.0.3 */ public int getDomainAxisIndex(CategoryAxis axis) { return this.domainAxes.indexOf(axis); }
